title: Secure Logging and Sensitive Data Protection
description: Logging must not expose sensitive data (PII, credentials, financial data). All logs must be secure and comply with data protection regulations.

regulatory_basis.rationale: Security of processing requires protection of personal data in logs
Information security includes secure logging practices

required_evidence.description: Code review confirming no sensitive data in logs
Security scan for sensitive data exposure

acceptance_criteria.description: No PII, credentials, or sensitive financial data in logs

test_obligations.description: Test log output for sensitive data leakage

implementation_hints.description: Use structured logging with field redaction

anti_patterns.risk: Exposure of sensitive data in logs
